purpose: Track upstream refs used by default for pymc-repeater-console builds and the latest resolved upstream main SHAs observed during review.
status_note: Default builds intentionally track upstream main branches. Build metadata records the resolved SHAs for each image.

release_policy.default_builds: use upstream main refs for pyMC Repeater, pyMC_core, and pyMC Console dist
release_policy.override_builds: may set PYMC_REPEATER_REF, PYMC_CORE_REF, or PYMC_CONSOLE_REF to a branch, tag, or commit SHA for review or recovery
release_policy.upstream_drift: must be detected and reported, not hidden by compatibility shims

current_default_refs.contract_test_status: source-level tests pass; live container build/test should record resolved SHAs

pymc_repeater.verification_note: Upstream main includes config-file radio selection for radio_type=pymc_tcp and radio_type=pymc_usb.

wrapper_contract_notes: No upstream source should be patched on disk.
Ingress path/base-url/header/WebSocket adaptation is allowed when response content remains upstream-controlled.
Local substitute APIs under upstream-looking /api routes are not allowed in normal operation.
If upstream does not provide /api/analytics routes, the wrapper must not fake them.
pyMC Repeater runtime configuration belongs in /config/pymc-repeater/config.yaml.
Home Assistant add-on options/schema must not expose pyMC Repeater runtime settings.
